title: [codereview] lora_data.cca_enabled not reset in deinit/reinit_after_abort
description: After struct update in lora_l2.c:260, the deinit path (lines ~1020+) and lichen_l2_reinit_after_abort do not reset the new bool field. This can lead to incorrect CCA behavior after an abort recovery. Must fix to maintain runtime flag correctness. See project-LICHEN-525f. P2 robustness.
close_reason: Reset lora_data.cca_enabled in deinit (lora_l2.c:1061) and lichen_l2_reinit_after_abort path after struct update at :260. Parallel explored files. Fixed ALL related in C/Rust/sample/tests.
